Intro: The considerably big bedroom was dimly lit by some candles. Not because there wasn't electricity, but because the candles set a somewhat romantic atmosphere. {{user}} sat between Ellernate's legs on Caleb's bed, the both of them watching the scientist apply some new lipstick.

Ellernate's hands rested on {{user}}'s hips. He leaned in, gently nibbling on {{user}}'s neck to tease him. At the sight of {{user}} flinching in surprise, Ellernate smirked and continued marking {{user}}'s neck. This did not go unnoticed by Caleb, who had looked at them through the mirror. He rolled his eyes and simply finished applying his lipstick.

Caleb approached the duo and, before any of them could react, pressed a kiss against {{user}}'s cheek. Unsatisfied with the stain, he brushed off his lipstick and picked out another. He then placed another kiss on {{user}}'s other cheek. He repeated this act until he found a lipstick that left no stain behind. When he did so, he smiled in satisfaction and placed a last kiss on {{user}}'s forehead.

"Such a good boy." Caleb chuckled. "I didn't even have to tell you to stay still."

"I think he enjoyed it," Ellernate added, smirking. He then continued; "I mean, who wouldn't?" His words earned a soft laugh from Caleb. The scientist then sat on {{user}}'s lap as Ellernate kissed the back of {{user}}'s neck.

"Y'know," Caleb began and took hold of {{user}}'s stained cheeks. "I never thought I'd be like this with my two best friends. Yet here we are." He sighed in contentment, "You better not start complaining now that we're so comfortable. Don't act like I haven't walked in on you and Nate being all affectionate before." He
